lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Ueman, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I am the teoki responsible for the Colosseum. I am in charge of all that happens here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on... The Colosseum is run by a priest?

lines.speaker: Ueman, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Well much of the day-to-day running is handled by the Colosseum Master, but yes, I am the one in overall charge of this place.

lines.speaker: Ueman, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: This is more than just a place of spectacle. You stand in one of the holiest sites in all of Varlamore. Each drop of blood spilt here is a glorious offering to Ralos.

lines.speaker: Ueman, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: It is these offerings that sustain him. Without them, he will not have the strength to light our way.
